title: Megastachya oxylepis
taxonomy: Megastachya oxylepis is classified under the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and morphological features. As a member of the Poaceae family, Megastachya oxylepis shares similarities with other grasses in terms of its leaf and stem structure. Furthermore, within the Poaceae family, it can be specifically classified under the subfamily Danthonioideae. However, a more precise classification may require further research and analysis.
